title: Basic Operations on a Linear Data Structure
description: A flowchart illustrating the core logic for inserting a new element, deleting an existing element, and displaying all elements within a simple linear data structure like an array or list.
relationships: The user selects an operation, which branches the flow to the correct procedure
Each procedure checks the state (e.g., is it full for insert, empty for delete) before performing its action
Each procedure concludes by updating the structure and returning to the start to await the next command
